speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome, welcome! Come on over here and check out this beautiful 2017 Nissan Altima SV. Low miles for the year, super clean inside and out, and it's loaded with features like power seats and dual-zone climate control. This one runs like a dream and is priced to sell – you won't find a better deal anywhere!

args.message: That sounds great. Has this car been in any accidents?

text: That sounds great. Has this car been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Not a chance! This Altima has a squeaky-clean history. It's been meticulously maintained and has never seen a fender bender. You can tell by how smoothly it drives – pure quality!

speaker: buyer

args.message: Good to hear. What kind of mileage are you seeing on average with this car?

text: Good to hear. What kind of mileage are you seeing on average with this car?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Altima is a real gas sipper! You can expect to get around 30 MPG on the highway, and probably closer to 25 in the city. It's incredibly fuel-efficient, which is great for the wallet these days, right?

text: This Altima is a real gas sipper! You can expect to get around 30 MPG on the highway, and probably closer to 25 in the city. It's incredibly fuel-efficient, which is great for the wallet these days, right?

speaker: buyer

args.message: That sounds pretty good. I'm looking to buy today, and I can offer you $11,200 for it.

text: That sounds pretty good. I'm looking to buy today, and I can offer you $11,200 for it.

speaker: seller

args.message: $11,200? That's a fair offer, and I appreciate you wanting to do business today. But honestly, this Altima is easily worth every penny of the asking price, and frankly, I've already had other folks who know a great deal when they see it sniffing around. How about we meet in the middle at $11,350? That’s a steal for a car this sharp.
